title: Company bank information PUT schema
description: A schema for updating company bank information under self.

bankSortCode.description: The registration number of the bank account.

bankAccountNumber.description: The account number in the company's bank.

pbsCustomerGroupNumber.description: Number used when registering an invoice to betalingsservice. Only used in Denmark.

pbsFiSupplierNumber.description: Number used when registering an invoice to betalingsservice. Only used in Denmark.

bankGiroNumber.description: The company's bankgiro number. Only used in Sweden and Norway.

giro.description: The company's Giro number. Only used in Denmark.

bankgirotCustomerNumber.description: The company's bank Giro number. Only used in Sweden.
